feature: Footage Markers — tag clips to day/task/exercise for ClipForge

decisions.storage: refs only (filename + capturedAt); no media bytes; ClipForge matches by filename/time
decisions.granularity: day + optional task + optional exercise (by canonical name) + highlight flag
decisions.scope: goaldmine side (model + UI + MCP read) + ClipForge consumer spec doc

migration_policy: backend agent edits schema + prisma generate + typecheck; orchestrator runs `migrate dev` on main after SQL review (Neon = prod)
